## Checklist

- [ ] If this changes normative text in `SPEC.md`, there is a linked issue where the change was proposed
- [ ] `SPEC.md`, `Vault-LD Example/`, and the reference tools stay in sync (or the change touches none of them)
- [ ] The roundtrip still holds: `vault → RDF → vault` is a no-op; `RDF → vault → RDF` is graph-isomorphic
- [ ] New normative statements use RFC 2119 key words (MUST/SHOULD/MAY)
